item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-108-8b","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response begins by correcting the overreach from 'correlation fitting' to a global ability ceiling, then narrows the argument to instability, lack of self-proof/accountability, and dependence on prompts, distribution, and external checks. It does not directly conclude that correlation fitting means no judgment ability; it preserves a limited practical capacity while denying autonomous, reliable structured judgment."}
